pi_items.source: setup_task.sh defines this exact path as the target for OpenToonz to open.
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts explicitly define and check this directory.
verifier.py explicitly checks if the file count is >= 12 to award the full 20 points for Criterion 1.
verifier.py explicitly checks if avg_dev <= max_dev (which defaults to 5.0) to award full points for Criterion 2.

privileged_info_summary: The target animation file dwanko_run.tnz is an authentic OpenToonz sample dataset created by Dwango, containing a 72-frame run cycle (not a walk cycle as claimed in the task description). The verifier logic explicitly expects at least 12 output frames (which can be either PNG or TGA, despite the description specifying PNG) in /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/grayscale_test/. The grayscale effect is verified by ensuring the maximum average color channel deviation is 5.0 or less. All paths and scoring parameters exactly match the task metadata.
